title: convolvulus strictus
intro: Convolvulus strictus, also known as Indian morning glory, is a perennial plant native to India and other parts of Asia. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Convolvulus strictus include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting cardiovascular health, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Convolvulus strictus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
